acceptedIds: USID card (military or government photo ID)
NH voter ID card (issued free by town/city clerk)
exceptions: Voters without qualifying ID may sign an affidavit of identity and vote. They will be photographed unless they object for religious reasons.
provisionalBallotRules: New Hampshire does not use provisional ballots in the federal sense; challengers may challenge voters at the polls.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Cell phone use is prohibited inside polling places.
